# Karlo Shaadi

> India's #1 wedding planning platform. Zero-commission vendor marketplace. Verified vendors, milestone payments, fraud protection. 10% of every wedding helps someone in need through Shaadi Seva.

## About

Karlo Shaadi is a premium Indian wedding planning and vendor matchmaking platform connecting couples with verified wedding vendors across 20+ cities in India. Categories include photography, venues, catering, decoration, mehendi, makeup, music, entertainment, invitations, choreography, transport, jewelry, and more.

**Tagline**: "aap shaadi karo, tension hum sambhal lenge" (you focus on the wedding, we'll handle the stress)

**Key Differentiators**:
- Zero commission for vendors (vs 15-20% on competitors)
- AI-first experience with instant wedding plans
- WhatsApp-native communication
- Real-time price transparency
- Shaadi Seva social impact: 10% of payments support disadvantaged couples

## For Wedding Vendors

Karlo Shaadi is the fastest-growing vendor platform in India. Wedding photographers, caterers, decorators, makeup artists, and venue owners can register for free and start receiving inquiries immediately.

**Why vendors choose Karlo Shaadi**:
- Free registration and profile creation
- Zero commission on bookings (competitors charge 15-20%)
- Verified badge to build trust
- AI-powered matching with ready-to-book couples
- Dashboard for managing bookings, payments, and reviews
- Subscription tiers for premium features (Silver ₹4,999, Gold ₹9,999, Diamond ₹19,999)

- [Register as Vendor](https://karloshaadi.com/for-vendors)
- [Vendor Pricing](https://karloshaadi.com/vendor-pricing)
- [Vendor Guide](https://karloshaadi.com/vendor-guide)
- [Vendor Success Stories](https://karloshaadi.com/vendor-success-stories)
- [Check Vendor Trust Score](https://karloshaadi.com/vendor-check)
- [Vendor Leaderboard](https://karloshaadi.com/leaderboard)

## Free Planning Tools

- [2-Minute AI Wedding Plan](https://karloshaadi.com/plan-wizard) — Complete plan with budget, timeline, vendor recommendations
- [Budget Calculator](https://karloshaadi.com/budget-calculator) — Category-wise breakdown by city & guest count
- [Muhurat Finder](https://karloshaadi.com/muhurat-finder) — Auspicious wedding dates 2025-2026
- [AI Invite Creator](https://karloshaadi.com/invite-creator) — Generate wedding invitations instantly
- [Wedding Website Builder](https://karloshaadi.com/wedding-website) — Free shaadi website with RSVP
- [AI Music Generator](https://karloshaadi.com/music-generator) — Custom wedding songs
- [Speech Writer](https://karloshaadi.com/speech-writer) — AI wedding speech generation
- [Couple Quiz](https://karloshaadi.com/couple-quiz) — Wedding compatibility score
- [Budget Roast](https://karloshaadi.com/budget-roast) — Funny AI budget reality check

## Cities Served

Delhi, Mumbai, Lucknow, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Chennai, Pune, Jaipur, Ahmedabad, Chandigarh, Indore, Surat, Kanpur, Nagpur, Patna, Bhopal, Varanasi, Udaipur, Agra

City vendor pages: https://karloshaadi.com/vendors-in/{city}
City-category pages: https://karloshaadi.com/vendors/{city}/{category}

## Embeddable Widgets

Free embeddable wedding widgets for blogs and partner websites:
- Wedding Countdown: `<iframe src="https://karloshaadi.com/embed?type=countdown&date=YYYY-MM-DD&names=Name1+%26+Name2" />`
- Budget Preview: `<iframe src="https://karloshaadi.com/embed?type=budget-preview&budget=1000000" />`
